summary.intent: Fix 6 bugs found in a pass-3 Codex review of the carousel component, covering dynamic-props reconfiguration, no-op-transition stalls, and AutoPlay behavioral issues.
summary.outcome: All 6 findings addressed: SyncControlledIndex replaced with a comprehensive SyncProps pattern (following splitter precedent), navigate_to refactored to return Option to skip no-ops, AutoPlayTick and AutoPlayStart guards added, controlled index clamped at init. 113 tests pass, xci-fast green, committed and pushed.

repo: The workspace convention for dynamic-props reconciliation is a SyncProps { props } event that re-derives all config in the arm, as established by the splitter component.
sync_controlled is the workspace utility for handling Some↔None controlled/uncontrolled prop transitions.
The carousel spec (spec/components/layout/carousel.md) must be kept in sync with implementation — it is a first-class artifact updated in the same commit.
The xci-fast gate is the final CI check before pushing; the pipeline is build → clippy → unit tests → xci-fast.

code.finding: SyncControlledIndex event replaced with SyncProps { props }; Event no longer derives Copy (mirrors splitter).
navigate_to now returns Option, returning None for no-op transitions (same index), eliminating stalled transition state.
AutoPlayStart now clears the paused flag; AutoPlayTick guards on next == current instead of can_go_next to avoid no-op stalls.
Controlled index is now clamped at init time to prevent out-of-bounds starting state.

workflow: Multi-pass Codex reviews surface findings incrementally; pass-3 added 6 more threads after pass-2 fixes introduced new issues.
TDD practice: new tests for all 6 findings were added alongside the fixes, growing the suite from 82 to 113 tests.
Em-dashes and special characters in Rust doc comments break exact-string Edit tool matching; editing on unique signature/return lines avoids this.

friction: Em-dashes in a doc comment caused the Edit tool to fail matching navigate_to; required a second attempt targeting only the function signature and return type lines.
Three separate call-site edits were needed after changing navigate_to's return type from a value to Option, as the old callers wrapped the result in Some(...).
open_items: The pass-2 on_props_changed was a partial implementation that this pass-3 work supersedes — any downstream components that relied on the old SyncControlledIndex event should be audited.
